mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `position` WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(`sequence`, 'M', 'P', 'S'), position_code ASC
SELECT * FROM `position` WHERE `sequence` = #{sequence} AND status = 1 ORDER BY position_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `position` (position_name, position_code, `sequence`, grade_range, default_probation_months, description, is_standard, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{positionName}, #{positionCode}, #{sequence}, #{gradeRange}, #{defaultProbationMonths}, #{description}, #{isStandard}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `position` SET position_name = #{positionName}, position_code = #{positionCode}, `sequence` = #{sequence}, grade_range = #{gradeRange}, default_probation_months = #{defaultProbationMonths}, description = #{description}, is_standard = #{isStandard}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
